use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS dashboards and web applications
Form submission triggers with semantic intent variants
Interactive controls in developer tools and admin interfaces
User action buttons across e-commerce checkout flows
Navigation and feature activation in fintech applications
ai_summary: IntentUI Button is an atomic, accessible button component built on react-aria-components with Tailwind Variants. Supports multiple semantic intents (primary, secondary, warning, danger, outline, plain) with CSS custom property theming for consistent dark/light mode styling. Features inset-ring styling, focus-visible states, and built-in icon/avatar slot support for versatile composition.
